function.name: search_products
function.description: Fuzzy search products by name or SKU fragment. (GET /api/products/search)

query.description: Text to match against product name and SKU.

function.name: get_product_by_sku
function.description: Fetch a single product by its exact SKU. (GET /api/products/by-sku)

function.name: barcode_lookup
function.description: Resolve a scanned barcode (UPC/EAN/GTIN) to a product. (GET /api/products/barcode-lookup)

code.description: The scanned barcode value (query param is named "code").

function.name: get_product
function.description: Fetch the full product record by its numeric id. (GET /api/products/{id})
